content.en:
After Ye Tian broke through to the ten-dimensional realm, he dared to wander in the Xuantian Domain, unlike in the past, when he only dared to stay in the mansion and cultivate silently.

Subsequently.

He walked all over the Xuantian Domain, saw more places, and naturally encountered some killings, and he would occasionally participate in them, and he would also get more resources and secret books of the gods.

Of course, his main purpose was to obtain more and higher divine talents.

The Xuantian Domain is too big, Ye Tian can obtain the Seven-Star Divine Dimension Talent in the Desolate Heaven Sect, so in the vast Xuantian Domain, he can naturally obtain a better Divine Dimension talent.

It didn't take long for him to obtain the eight-star Divine Dimension talent, and then the Nine-Star Divine Dimension talent.

However, the nine-star divine dimensional talent is already a very genius level, and it is not easy to encounter the ten-star divine dimensional talent.

In addition, Ye Tian's copying talent was suppressed by the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth, which made it impossible for him to easily spy on the talents of other strong "Nine Zero Zero" people, so it was difficult to find a better Divine Dimension talent.

Until a certain day.

Ye Tian met the son of a huge family in the Xuantian Domain, Luo Qingshan.

Luo Qingshan is the son of the head of the Luo family in the Xuantian Domain, he is not very old, but his strength has reached the ten-dimensional realm, and he has a certain reputation in the Xuantian Domain.

This son's divine talent level is definitely not low.

"I have to find a way to touch this Luo Qingshan!"

Ye Tian muttered.

This kind of family disciple is not a good person, if he touches him rashly, he will definitely attack him.

He is not afraid of Luo Qingshan, but the Luo family behind him is a behemoth, and he can't afford to offend it at present.

And Luo Qingshan definitely has a protector by his side, and he is probably not an opponent.

Therefore, he had to find a reasonable reason to touch Luo Qingshan.

A direct challenge?

It doesn't seem to work, he doesn't have a reputation in the Xuantian Domain now, and if a ten-dimensional powerhouse challenges Luo Qingshan, no one will agree.

"It's a pity that my copying talent is now in the most basic state, and it seems that it is still a little inferior, and I can't copy my body. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

If he could copy his body, he could completely copy someone else's body, and then forcibly touch Luo Qingshan, so he didn't have to worry so much.

However, he soon found his chance.

......

In an attic.

Luo Qingshan stayed here and drank tea.

Suddenly.

Rumble!!!

A large hand crossed the void to kill, and with one palm it was about to destroy the area he was.

"It's not good, it's the attack of a 12-dimensional powerhouse!"

Luo Qingshan shouted: "Uncle Yu save me!"

At this moment, where does Luo Qingshan still have the slightest posture of a peerless genius, and some are just panicked.

In the face of the attack of the 12th dimensional powerhouse, there is really no way at all.

Rumble!!!!

A figure came across the void and directly blocked the attack of that twelve-dimensional powerhouse.

The one who came was Luo Qingshan's protector, the twelve-dimensional powerhouse - Yu Hai!

Thundered!

The slaughter of the powerhouses of the Twelve Dimensions almost destroyed the small city and the surrounding area.

And Luo Qingshan fled directly across the void, and at this time, another ten-dimensional powerhouse came from all directions on the ground, with the purpose of chasing and killing Luo Qingshan.

Thundered!!!!

Luo Qingshan's strength is not weak, and he is still not weak against more than a dozen ten-dimensional powerhouses on his own.

But immediately after, an eleventh dimensional powerhouse descended.

At this moment, Luo Qingshan was desperate.

However, a figure appeared beside Luo Qingshan, dragging Luo Qingshan and running.

This person is Ye Tian, he found this opportunity and directly touched Luo Qingshan, and he was rescuing Luo Qingshan, so it was reasonable to touch.

"Thank you, Your Excellency, for saving me!"

Luo Qingshan thanked.

Although Ye Tian's cultivation is only a ten-dimensional powerhouse, his speed seems to be very fast, much faster than him, and he should have performed a top-notch killing move that increased his speed.

......

"It turned out to be an eleven-star divine talent, and the qualifications are really good!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Ahead, there were several ten-dimensional powerhouses intercepting it.

Ye Tian performed a top-notch killing move.

Rumble!!!!

Several ten-dimensional powerhouses were directly torn apart and fell on the spot.

Seeing this scene, Luo Qingshan's pupils shrank, and this strength was already much more powerful than that of ordinary eleventh dimensional powerhouses.

However, the Eleventh Dimensional powerhouse had already hunted him down.

"I'm here to intercept that eleventh dimensional powerhouse, you run away!"

Saying that, Ye Tian and the eleventh dimensional powerhouse were killed.

Boom!!

Ye Tian and the eleventh dimensional powerhouse were killed for a while, and they couldn't help each other for a while, so they fled directly....

As for Luo Qingshan, he has already bought a lot of time for the other party, if the other party can't escape, then it has nothing to do with him.

The eleven-star divine talent has arrived, and he doesn't have to take any risks.

He also knew very well that this matter was not simple, involving the Luo family and the enemies of the Luo family, no matter which side it was, he could not afford to offend.

So, he didn't dare to get involved too much.

Subsequently.

He quickly left, then found a place to live in seclusion.

After that, he fused the eleven-star divine dimensional talent, and then cultivated silently.

After a period of time, he finally broke through again and reached the eleventh dimensional realm.

With his current strength, he was enough to rival the powerhouses of the Twelfth Dimension.

At this time, he came out to show his head, and by the way, he inquired about the incident of Luo Qingshan's attack.

"Did Luo Qingshan really survive?"

Ye Tian learned that Luo Qingshan was still caught up in the end, but the support of the Luo family arrived, and the ancestor of the Luo family, a fifteen-dimensional powerhouse, directly attacked, killing a large number of enemies.

In the end, the Luo family also found the mastermind behind the scenes, but the strength of the mastermind behind the scenes was not weak, and in the end, the Luo family suffered a lot of losses, but it also killed the enemy and withdrew from the Xuantian Domain.

That's all there is to it.

"If I look for Luo Qingshan, I'm afraid I will have to get some benefits, after all, I bought him some time. "

But Ye Tian didn't really go to Luo Qingshan, the reward was just that, if it was involved in 0.8, it would not be easy to get out.

Besides, he had already obtained what he wanted, and he was already satisfied.

The days that followed.

Ye Tian silently accumulated resources to improve his strength, and constantly improved to create a better Tianwei secret method, coupled with the improvement of Shenwei's talent, his strength could naturally increase rapidly.

In a flash, hundreds of god-years passed.

this day.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's body was frantically absorbing a large amount of divine power, carrying out the transformation of his body, and he was breaking through to the twelve-dimensional realm.

I don't know how long it took for his transformation to be truly completed, and his cultivation officially reached the twelve-dimensional realm.

With his current strength, it is enough to match the thirteenth dimensional powerhouse, except for some old guys, his strength is already among the top in the Xuantian Domain.
